services_supported: install sprinkler systems for commercial buildings
maintain sprinkler systems for commercial buildings
emergency_definition: Water pressure loss in the system
non_emergency_routing_rules: Inspection scheduling and maintenance requests can wait until next day.
notes: BlueLine Sprinklers is based in Chicago, specializing in commercial sprinkler systems. They struggle with after-hours emergency calls related to burst pipes and other critical failures, and use ServiceTrade for job management.
